findings.message: SC1071: ShellCheck only supports sh/bash/dash/ksh/'busybox sh' scripts. Sorry!
findings.fix_hint: Run `shellcheck <file>` locally to see context; fix per shellcheck wiki.

findings.message: PostToolUse hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/auto-format.sh"
PostToolUse hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/auto-test.sh"
SessionEnd hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/breadcrumb-writer.sh"
PermissionRequest hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/permission-auto-approve.sh"
PermissionDenied hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/permission-denied.sh"
PreToolUse hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/pr-gate.sh"
UserPromptSubmit hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/prompt-injection-guard.sh"
PreToolUse hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/protect-files.sh"
PreToolUse hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/safety-guards.sh"
SessionEnd hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/session-end-note.sh"
SessionStart hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/session-start.sh"
Stop hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/session-stop.sh"
Stop hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/stop-notification.sh"
PostToolUse hook → bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/test-fix-detector.sh"
